name: Check Bounce
query:
SELECT
    pe.reference_date AS "Return Date:Date:150",

    c.customer_name AS "Dealer Name:Data:220",

    pe.reference_no AS "Cheque No.:Data:150",

    pe.paid_amount AS "Amount:Currency:150",

    pe.custom_sales_person AS "Sales Person Name:Link/Sales Person:200"

FROM
    `tabPayment Entry` pe

LEFT JOIN
    `tabCustomer` c
ON
    c.name = pe.party

WHERE
    pe.docstatus = 1

ORDER BY
    pe.reference_date DESC
